name: @e4a/pg-js
description: Browser SDK for PostGuard — end-to-end encrypted file sharing with identity-based encryption

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/generate-wasm-base64.mjs && node scripts/generate-yivi-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-version.mjs
scripts.pretypecheck: node scripts/generate-wasm-base64.mjs && node scripts/generate-yivi-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-version.mjs
scripts.pretest: node scripts/generate-wasm-base64.mjs && node scripts/generate-yivi-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-version.mjs
scripts.pretest:watch: node scripts/generate-wasm-base64.mjs && node scripts/generate-yivi-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-version.mjs
scripts.prepare: node scripts/generate-wasm-base64.mjs && node scripts/generate-yivi-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-version.mjs && tsdown
